song.title: Still My Soul Be Still
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C E
song.lyrics:
[V1] . G C 1) Still my soul be still . Em And do not fear . G C C - D Though winds of change may rage tomorrow . G C God is at your side . Em No longer dread . G C - D The fires of unxpected sorrow
[C] Chorus . Em D G God You are my God . Am Em C - D And I will trust in You and not be shaken . Em D G Lord of peace, renew . Am Em A steadfast spirit within me . C D Em To rest in You alone
[V2] . G C 2) Still my soul be still . Em Do not be moved . G C C - D By lesser lights and fleeting shadows . G C Hold on to His ways . Em With shield of faith . G C C - D Against temptations flaming arrows
[V3] . G C 3) Still my soul be still . Em Do not forsake . G C C - D The truth you learned in the beginning . G C Wait upon the Lord . Em And hope will rise . G C C - D As stars appear when day is dimming
[E] 1) Still my soul be still And do not fear Though winds of change may rage tomorrow God is at your side No longer dread The fires of unxpected sorrow Chorus God You are my God And I will trust in You and not be shaken Lord of peace, renew A steadfast spirit within me To rest in You alone 2) Still my soul be still Do not be moved By lesser lights and fleeting shadows Hold on to His ways With shield of faith Against temptations flaming arrows 3) Still my soul be still Do not forsake The truth you learned in the beginning Wait upon the Lord And hope will rise As stars appear when day is dimming
